title: The Rocket That Just Won't Quit

scenes.text: A new Chinese rocket has just shown its incredible reusability!
The Long March 10B is designed to be reused multiple times, changing the future of space travel.
This marks a significant step in reducing costs for future space missions.
A leap towards affordable space exploration!
scenes.label: AFFORDABLE SPACE!

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: The Long March 10B opens new doors for reusability, promising to change space exploration. Follow for daily science!
